articles.title: India woos global tech, bets big on AI data centers
articles.summary: The country is aiming to become a global hub for artificial intelligence and cloud computing infrastructure. But AI data centers' enormous energy and water demands present a challenge.
articles.one_line: India woos global tech, bets big on AI data centers
